subcategory: 3D interactive product card with perspective transforms
use_cases: Displaying featured products in e-commerce storefronts with immersive 3D hover effects
Showcasing premium products in SaaS landing pages with interactive card tilting
Creating interactive product galleries with mouse-tracking perspective transforms
Building product catalogs with animated card interactions that respond to user cursor position
ai_summary: An interactive 3D product card component featuring smooth perspective transformations on mouse movement, creating a premium tactile feel. The card displays product imagery with a layered design including logo, title, description, and pricing. Uses CSS 3D transforms with perspective for dynamic tilting effects and subtle scaling on hover, making it ideal for high-end e-commerce and product showcase scenarios.
